PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for and with Deidra Lintz, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired whether counsel had received any communication from Rashad Dawson. Mr. Wrobel confirmed that while initial contact was made to begin the probate process, Mr. Dawson ceased responding after the process was explained. Deidra Lintz added that she had spoken to Mr. Dawson, who verbally agreed to move forward but had since taken no action. Mr. Wrobel confirmed that no written or oral objections had been received.

The court noted the lack of objections from Mr. Dawson or any other interested party took the petition under submission with the intent to grant the petition as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
